ogTitle: Mundulla West vs Munno Para: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mundulla West and Munno Para.
heading: Mundulla West vs Munno Para — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mundulla West, South Australia and Munno Para, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Munno Para has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Mundulla West (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mundulla West or Munno Para safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mundulla West has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Munno Para scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mundulla West scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Munno Para scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mundulla West or Munno Para?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Munno Para has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
